data.user_prompt: What is community-based mental health care, and who provides it in Louisville?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response chat_gpt What is community-based mental health care, and who provides it in Louisville?

sections.text:
**Searching for local providers**

I need to use the web tool to run a search for local providers. It should help me gather the information I need. I'll focus on ensuring that I define the parameters clearly while browsing. This could really streamline my process. I wonder if I should specify certain services or areas to narrow down the results. Let’s see what I can find and gather useful details to work with!

**Looking for mental health resources**

I need to compile a more authoritative list of community mental health centers in Kentucky, specifically mentioning Seven Counties Services and Bridgehaven. It makes sense to also check the city page for additional resources. I plan to open both the city page and the Seven Counties PDF to confirm the details and ensure I'm providing accurate information for anyone who needs support. I want to make sure I get this right!

### What “community-based mental health care” means
In Louisville (and generally across the U.S.), **community-based mental health care** refers to **mental health services delivered in the community rather than through long-term inpatient hospital stays**. It often includes:
- **Outpatient therapy** (individual, group, family)
- **Psychiatry / medication management**
- **Crisis response and supports**
- **Case management / care coordination**
- **Rehabilitation and recovery supports** (help with daily functioning, support services, referrals)
- Services that aim to help people **live, work, and get support in their own neighborhoods**

Louisville Metro explicitly groups these kinds of supports under “community mental health services.” ([louisvilleky.gov](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services?utm_source=openai))

---

### Who provides it in Louisville?
A number of organizations provide community-based mental health care, including the following (not an exhaustive list):

1) **Seven Counties Services (Community Mental Health Center)**
- Provides outpatient mental health and substance-use services in the Louisville area. ([resources.hdiuky.org](https://resources.hdiuky.org/resource/seven-counties-services-inc-community-mental-health-center/?utm_source=openai))

2) **Bridgehaven Mental Health Services**
- Provides community-based psychiatric rehabilitation and recovery services and related supports in Louisville. ([bridgehaven.org](https://www.bridgehaven.org/contact/?utm_source=openai))

3) **City/Metro-coordinated community resources**
- Louisville’s “Community Mental Health Services” page points people to local crisis/deflection and other community supports (including specific local contacts listed on the page). ([louisvilleky.gov](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services?utm_source=openai))

4) **Hospital/health-system outpatient behavioral health programs**
- **UofL Health** offers outpatient behavioral health services (and tele-behavioral health options). ([uoflhealth.org](https://uoflhealth.org/services/mental-and-behavioral-health/adult-outpatient-services/?utm_source=openai))  
- **Norton Healthcare** provides outpatient behavioral health care as part of its behavioral health services in the Louisville area. ([nortonhealthcare.com](https://nortonhealthcare.com/services-and-conditions/behavioral-health/?utm_source=openai))

5) **Other outpatient/community behavioral health providers**
Examples include:
- **Solace Life Change** (outpatient behavioral health & substance-use treatment program in Louisville). ([solacelifechange.com](https://solacelifechange.com/?utm_source=openai))  
- **Creative Spirits Behavioral Health** (describes itself as providing community-based mental health care in Louisville). ([creativespiritsonline.com](https://www.creativespiritsonline.com/?utm_source=openai))  

---

If you tell me **what kind of help you need** (therapy vs. psychiatry/meds, crisis support, adult vs. teen/child, insurance/self-pay, and your neighborhood), I can narrow this to the most relevant Louisville options.
